name: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source (Windows)
notes: Reports authentication failures on the same windows source computer more than 10 times, within 5 minutes.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source Workstation (custom) and different Username in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source Workstation (custom) and different Username in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source Workstation (custom) and different Username in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source
Event description: Detected authentication failures on the same Windows source computer with different user names more than 10 times in 5 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
